refined_caption: The hospital privacy curtain in the room appears to be torn or damaged. The tear is visible and may compromise patient privacy.
complaint_description: I was shocked to see that the privacy curtain in my hospital room was torn and damaged. This is a concern for me as it may affect my privacy during my stay. I hope it can be replaced or repaired soon.
voice_text: The privacy curtain in my room is all torn, can someone please fix it or replace it?
